rationale: Educ. Code §12.124 governs loans from management companies to open-enrollment charter schools. It has no relation to residence homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The charter holder or the governing body of an open-enrollment charter school may not accept a loan from a management company that has a contract to provide management services to:
_note: No conflict; rule addresses charter school management company loans, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
